title: plananthus reflexus
intro: Plananthus reflexus, also known as the Indian celandine or greater celandine, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and orange-red sap. The plant contains berberine, a medicinal compound with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which contributes to its numerous health benefits. The medicinal properties of Plananthus reflexus have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Plananthus reflexus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
